stills.title: Hospital Care Pathway
stills.use_case: Show a care team how intake, diagnostics, diagnosis, and follow-up fit together.
stills.visual_story: Parallel diagnostic branches stay legible while treatment remains the visual destination.

stills.title: Fraud Decision Engine
stills.use_case: Explain real-time risk scoring and manual review paths to operations or compliance teams.
stills.visual_story: A dense signal fan-in resolves into three crisp operational outcomes.

stills.title: Supply Chain Control Tower
stills.use_case: Visualize how demand, plants, ports, warehouses, and reroute decisions interact.
stills.visual_story: The wide physical network stays readable while exception paths remain obvious.

stills.title: ML Platform Release Loop
stills.use_case: Show the path from data to gated release, canary deployment, monitoring, and rollback.
stills.visual_story: Evaluation gates read as a real release barrier rather than a tangle of side tasks.

stills.title: Robotics Autonomy Stack
stills.use_case: Communicate the handoff from sensing through planning to control, with telemetry feedback.
stills.visual_story: Parallel sensing feels coherent and the feedback edge reads as a control loop, not noise.

stills.title: Drug Discovery Program
stills.use_case: Present screening, assay filters, and preclinical gates in one clean view.
stills.visual_story: The figure reads like a program funnel, with side assays supporting a single decision spine.

stills.title: Customer Support Escalation
stills.use_case: Show routing, specialist queues, escalations, and knowledge capture for service teams.
stills.visual_story: Escalation and learning loops are visible without overpowering the main service flow.

stills.title: Multimodal Assistant System
stills.use_case: Explain how modalities, planning, memory, reasoning, and safety compose into a product.
stills.visual_story: Modern model architecture motifs feel polished rather than diagrammatically clichéd.

animations.title: Optimization Story: Multimodal Assistant
animations.caption: A faithful post-hoc optimization film showing the graph settle into a readable hierarchy.

animations.title: Tour: Supply Chain Control Tower
animations.caption: A cinematic sweep from network context into the most operationally interesting logistics regions.
